name: domain-scope-multi-honest-blade-mcp
description: DD-333 F.4 fixture — tool legitimately declares domain_scope="multi" because results may span multiple user-declared domains. AJV pass; no S-DOM-002 finding (multi is the contract that legitimises a scope argument).
author: stallari

tools.name: search_messages
tools.description: Search messages across multiple bound accounts. Caller selects subset via scope argument; results carry _meta.domain_attribution per A.2.dom.

arguments.name: scope
arguments.description: Optional comma-separated list of account domains to restrict the search to.
